segments.text: Managed to scoop up that grounded bike with the dash attack!
segments.original_text: 地上バイクを投げるダッシュアタックでなんとか拾い

segments.text: Applied the Waft once the bike had built up the percent!
segments.original_text: バイクで%が伸びたところに対してオナラを当てていきました

segments.text: You could argue they forced out the Waft here, but
segments.original_text: ここでオナラを吐かせたとも取れるが
ルート混ぜれなかった

full_text: Managed to scoop up that grounded bike with the dash attack! Falcon Kick! Applied the Waft once the bike had built up the percent! You could argue they forced out the Waft here, but No combo route Couldn't work in the combo

corrections.original: 吐かせたとも一つ見れるが
corrections.corrected: 吐かせたとも取れるが
